title: First observation on emergence of strong room-temperature ferroelectricity and multiferroicity in 2D-Ti3C2Tx free-standing MXene film

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports room-temperature ferroelectricity and magnetoelectric coupling in a free-standing Ti3C2Tx MXene film that was partially oxidized by air exposure and annealing, forming TiO2 phases (anatase/rutile/brookite) within the MXene-derived composite. The key claim is a measured remanent polarization of 0.5 mC cm−2 and clear magnetoelectric switching, presented as the first experimental observation of multiferroicity in a 2D MXene film.

figures.description: Synthesis scheme for producing delaminated Ti3C2Tx MXene film from Ti3AlC2 MAX phase via HF/HCl etching, delamination, and vacuum filtration into a free-standing film.
Photograph/image of the sample stage used for ferroelectric/multiferroic measurements.
Schematic of the free-standing Ti3C2Tx film mounted with electrical connections between sample-stage pins and the film.
XRD patterns of Ti3AlC2 MAX phase, delaminated Ti3C2Tx MXene, and heat-treated Ti3C2Tx MXene film showing the shift of the (002) peak and loss of MAX reflections.
SEM micrograph of the bulk Ti3AlC2 MAX phase.
Cross-sectional SEM image of delaminated Ti3C2Tx MXene film showing separated sheets.
Raman spectra of air-exposed and heat-treated Ti3C2Tx MXene films, identifying anatase, rutile, brookite TiO2 phases and graphitic carbon bands.
Room-temperature polarization-electric field hysteresis loops for samples heated at 100 C and 150 C, with inset current-voltage curves for HT@100 C.
Electric field versus time and polarization versus time for HT@100 C, showing remanent polarization behavior under time-varying field.
Dielectric constant versus electric field butterfly-like hysteresis for HT@100 C over 1000 cycles, indicating reproducibility and stability.
Magnetoelectric coupling coefficient versus magnetic field for HT@100 C measured at room temperature, showing peaks near coercive fields.
Supplementary polarization-voltage measurements for air-exposed sample and samples heated above 150 C, showing conductive behavior rather than ferroelectric hysteresis.

paper_analysis.raw_measurement_details: The paper reports raw experimental measurements including XRD patterns, SEM images, Raman spectra, ferroelectric P-E loops, I-V curves, dielectric hysteresis, and magnetoelectric coupling curves collected on Ti3C2Tx free-standing films and heat-treated variants. The text does not specify file formats, scan parameters beyond some measurement conditions, or whether the underlying instrument output files are shared.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: Several figures are clearly processed/derived from measurements: polarization-electric field hysteresis loops, polarization-time traces, dielectric constant-electric field loops, and magnetoelectric coupling coefficient versus magnetic field. The XRD and Raman figures are also presented as plotted spectra/patterns, but they are still direct measurement outputs rather than tabulated source data.

dataset_characterization.data_availability_statement: The paper states: 'The data will be available on demand.' No repository, DOI, or supplementary source-data archive is described in the text provided.
dataset_characterization.raw_data_description: Raw data are implied to exist from the measurements, but the paper does not describe downloadable raw files, file names, formats, or instrument-exported datasets.
dataset_characterization.processed_data_description: Processed results are shown as figures: XRD patterns, Raman spectra, SEM images, ferroelectric hysteresis loops, I-V curves, dielectric hysteresis, and magnetoelectric coupling curves. No tables of extracted numerical values are provided in the text, aside from reported values such as remanent polarization of 0.5 mC cm−2.
dataset_characterization.figure_data_description: Figure-specific source data are not mentioned explicitly. The paper includes main-text figures and one supplementary figure (Fig. S1), but no statement about accompanying source-data files.
dataset_characterization.scripts_description: No analysis scripts, notebooks, or code are mentioned.
dataset_characterization.replot_reason: The paper does not provide explicit source-data files, numerical tables, or scripts. Figures are available only as rendered plots/images in the paper text, so exact replotting would require digitization or author-provided data on request.
dataset_characterization.notes: The dataset is primarily figure-based and appears to be standard experimental characterization data. The paper emphasizes a qualitative discovery claim and reports a few key scalar values, but does not document a structured dataset release. Supplementary Fig. S1 is mentioned, indicating additional figure data exist, but their underlying numerical source data are not described.

classification_prior.raw_data_evidence: The paper describes direct experimental acquisition of XRD, SEM, Raman, ferroelectric, dielectric, and magnetoelectric measurements on synthesized films.
classification_prior.source_data_evidence: No explicit mention of source-data files, numerical tables, or deposited figure data is present; only 'data will be available on demand.'
classification_prior.data_availability_section_relevant: The data will be available on demand.
classification_prior.review_notes: Be careful not to infer deposited source data from the presence of figures alone. The paper clearly contains raw experimental measurements, but the text does not support a claim of shared source-data files or scripts.
